Arr:
CASE WHEN ${split:text} IN (
    SELECT filter

    FROM topx
) THEN ${split:text} ELSE 'other' END AS spl

topx AS(SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN ${split:text} = '' THEN 'other' ELSE ${split:text} END AS filter, count() AS cnt FROM $table WHERE $timeFilter AND $adhoc GROUP BY ${split:text} ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10)
